name: Petaluma Pie Company
tagline: Sweet and savory pies, made from scratch in downtown Petaluma
seoDescription: Petaluma Pie Company has baked sweet and savory pies from local, organic ingredients in historic downtown Petaluma since 2010 — from shepherd’s pie and chicken

sections.heading: Handmade Pies, Sweet and Savory
sections.subheading: Since 2010, sweet and savory pies baked from local, organic ingredients in historic downtown Petaluma.
badges: Sweet & savory hand pies from scratch

sections.heading: About Petaluma Pie Company
body: Petaluma Pie Company has been making sweet and savory pies from local and organic ingredients since 2010. Founded by a local Petaluma entrepreneur and his mother, the little shop in Helen Putnam Plaza buys direct from farmers — and even grows some of its own produce — sourcing butter, eggs, cheese, meat, and fruit from Petaluma, Sonoma County, and Northern California.

The case is split between savory hand pies — shepherd’s pie, chicken pot pie, gyoza — and sweet seasonal fruit and cream pies like strawberry rhubarb, apple, cherry, and chocolate cream. Everything is available hot and ready to eat, or frozen to take and bake at home.
highlights: Sweet & savory hand pies from scratch
Local & organic — sourced from Sonoma County farms

items.title: Savory Hand Pies

items.title: Sweet Fruit Pies
items.description: Seasonal fruit pies like strawberry rhubarb, apple, and cherry, made with local fruit.

items.title: Cream Pies
items.description: Classic cream pies including chocolate cream, made from scratch.

items.title: Take & Bake
items.description: Frozen pies to bake fresh at home whenever you like.

items.title: Weddings & Catering
items.description: Pie for events, weddings, and gatherings across Sonoma County.
